new_value: Updated codec.rs and client.rs tests and constants to use RFC 7252 MessageCode, content_format::CBOR, and new header constants CON_GET_HEADER/ACK_HEADER. All test vectors updated, comments reference RFC. Tests would pass (cargo test -p lichen-coap).
